nasb.text: And they had forgotten to take bread, and did not have more than one loaf in the boat with them.

esv.text: Now they had forgotten to bring bread, and they had only one loaf with them in the boat.

cnv.text: 門徒忘了帶餅，船上除了一個餅，身邊沒有別的了。

ccb.text: 门徒忘了带饼，船上只有一个饼。

csbs.text: 门徒们忘了带饼，船上除了一个饼，再没有别的了。
